title: Oasis Diamante Clear Head Silver Pin 8mm
features: A beautifully crafted faux diamond pin
Adds impact to arrangements, gifts and art projects
Perfect for creating corsages, Bouquets, Arrangements, Gifts and Wedding Work
description: Product Description OASIS® Diamante Pins add impact and sparkle to any design. With 8mm clear diamond shaped heads on a strong 5cm silver metal pin, these versatile pins come nicely presented in a clear acrylic safety box. Perfect for a variety of uses including wedding work, corsages, buttonholes and gift arrangements. These pins also look stylish when placed in the centre of flower heads such as Roses for added glamour. A collection of wedding products designed to inspire. Glitz and glamour are all-important when creating the perfect wedding flowers for your customer. Equally essential are the minor details, mechanics and skills which make your reputation stand out from the rest. OASIS® Floral Products offer a huge Wedding Collection range; from floral foam Bouquet Holders to Decorative Pins, Beads and Diamantes to Wristlets and Corsage Aids. Whether you're creating a flowing elegant, statement bridal bouquet or a funky flower bracelet, the OASIS® Floral Products Wedding Collection has all the products needed to help you create wonderful wedding designs with guaranteed wow factor. Since their earliest days in 1954, when V.L. Smithers revolutionised the floral industry with the creation of water-absorbing foam for florists, Smithers-Oasis has grown into a leading global manufacturer and marketer of floral foam, floral accessory products, cellular growing media, and postharvest products. Today, OASIS® is the most recognised and trusted brand in the floral industry. Box Contains 100 x OASIS® Diamante Clear Head Silver Pin 8mm
